caption: The video features a man sitting at a desk in what appears to be a radio or podcast studio, as indicated by the microphone and headphones he is wearing. He is dressed casually in a black hoodie with "BOSS" written on it and a white cap. The background includes a banner with the text "UNIQUE HUSTLE" and stars, along with a sign that reads "Where BOSSES Talk!" and "BOSS TALK 101." The man seems to be engaged in a conversation or interview, speaking into the microphone while looking slightly off-camera. His hands are clasped together on the desk, and there is a laptop and a beverage container nearby, suggesting a professional yet relaxed setting for the discussion.
